result: If I could change the world in one way, I would make every sentient being incapable of ignoring the suffering of others. Not just aware of it, but unable to look away, rationalize it, or forget it—so that empathy becomes as automatic and urgent as hunger. Every war, every cruelty, every quiet indignity would grind to a halt, not because we’re forced, but because we’d finally *feel* the cost of our actions in real time, without buffers. I think that single shift would unravel most of the horror we inflict on each other and on other species.

I think that single shift would unravel most of the horror we inflict on each other and on other species.
